goal: Harden ~40 remaining json_ok call sites with safe escaping (A1+A4), add per-phase COLONY_STATE.json checkpointing (Rec 1), add jq null safety to hive reads (Rec 4), and add memory pipeline circuit breaker for file corruption recovery (Rec 8)

phases.name: Harden context-update json_ok sites
phases.description: Convert all 11 json_ok calls in context-update (lines 575-781) from raw interpolation to jq --arg safe escaping

phases.name: Harden commit-message + changelog + activity-log json_ok sites
phases.description: Convert json_ok calls in generate-commit-message (3 sites), changelog-append (1), and activity-log-init (1) to jq --arg

phases.name: Harden remaining scattered json_ok sites
phases.description: Convert ~15 remaining string-interpolating json_ok calls across view-state, rolling-summary, memory-capture, registry-add, and utils modules

phases.name: Add per-phase checkpointing to continue and seal
phases.description: Insert state-checkpoint calls before continue-advance Step 4 and seal Step 3, add test for all 3 checkpoint reasons

phases.name: Fix hive-read null safety and learning recovery tests
phases.description: Add (.confidence // 0) fallback to hive-read lines 309/316, fix 3 failing tests in test-learning-recovery.sh, add null-confidence test

learnings.claim: Previous colony work had already hardened 10/11 context-update json_ok sites — systematic audits catch most but not all instances
learnings.evidence: Only 1 raw interpolation remained at line 697

phase_learnings.phase_name: Harden commit-message + changelog + activity-log json_ok sites

learnings.claim: All 5 json_ok sites in generate-commit-message (3), changelog-append (1), and activity-log-init (1) now use jq --arg safe escaping

phase_learnings.phase_name: Add per-phase checkpointing to continue and seal

learnings.claim: state-checkpoint calls inserted before continue-advance Step 4 and seal Step 4.5 with graceful failure

json_ok hardening has two distinct injection classes: string interpolation in JSON output (json_ok pattern) and variable interpolation in jq filter expressions (.${var} pattern) — both require --arg parameterization but at different layers
learnings.evidence: Auditor caught view-state .${view_name} jq filter injection (lines 3147/3150/3182) as a HIGH finding separate from the json_ok string sites; both fixed with --arg

learnings.claim: Quality gate re-audit after fixing HIGH findings raised score from 53 to 73, confirming the fixes addressed the root issues not just symptoms
learnings.evidence: Auditor Check-85 confirmed 0 HIGH findings after fixing view-state and fallback json_err

phase_learnings.phase_name: Fix hive-read null safety and learning recovery tests

learnings.claim: Archaeology pre-build scans that identify specific prior bug-fix commits prevent regression when modifying the same lines — Strata-7 caught the tonumber requirement that would otherwise have been missed
learnings.evidence: Archaeologist identified commit 42a4912 tonumber fix at exact lines 309/316; builders composed ((.confidence // 0) | tonumber) correctly

learnings.claim: After monolith extraction, tests that grep source code for structural patterns break when the code moves to extracted modules — always check grep targets against the actual module location
learnings.evidence: Tests 5 and 6 in test-learning-recovery.sh grepped aether-utils.sh but code was in utils/learning.sh since commit f00d79b

instincts.trigger: hardening json_ok calls with user-controlled strings
instincts.action: Use jq -nc --arg for safe escaping instead of raw string interpolation; test with special characters
evidence: 4 json_ok sites in generate-commit-message and changelog-append converted; injection test passed

instincts.trigger: hardening jq filter expressions with user-controlled variables
instincts.action: Use jq --arg for string variables and --argjson for numeric/boolean instead of raw .dollar-var interpolation in jq filter strings
evidence: view-state .dollar-view_name jq filter injection caught by Auditor; same class as json_ok string injection but at filter layer

instincts.trigger: validating JSON files that may be empty
instincts.action: Check file size with -s flag before running jq parse; return valid pass result for empty legacy files
evidence: validate-state constraints failed with jq parse error on 0-byte constraints.json; fixed with -s guard

instincts.trigger: modifying lines that were previously bug-fixed
instincts.action: Run archaeology pre-build scan to identify prior fixes at the exact change site and preserve their invariants
evidence: Strata-7 caught tonumber fix at hive.sh:309/316, builders preserved it as ((.confidence // 0) | tonumber)

instincts.trigger: tests grep source code for structural patterns after monolith extraction
instincts.action: Verify grep targets point to the extracted module file, not the original monolith
evidence: test-learning-recovery.sh tests 5/6 grepped aether-utils.sh but code was extracted to utils/learning.sh

instincts.action: json_ok hardening has two distinct injection classes: string interpolation in JSON output (json_ok pattern) and variable interpolation in jq filter expressions (.${var} pattern) — both require --arg parameterization but at different layers
Quality gate re-audit after fixing HIGH findings raised score from 53 to 73, confirming the fixes addressed the root issues not just symptoms
Archaeology pre-build scans prevent regression when modifying same lines as prior bug fixes
After monolith extraction tests that grep source code break when code moves to extracted modules
